name: pnp-sharepoint-skills-style-terminal
title: Style: Terminal
shortDescription: Terminal/hacker style tokens for the list-styling skill. Dark badges, neon green accents, matrix-style progress bars.
longDescription: Terminal/hacker style tokens for the list-styling skill. Dark badges with neon green accents and matrix-style progress bars — a developer-friendly aesthetic for ops dashboards and engineering boards.
Use when the user says 'terminal,' 'hacker,' 'dark mode,' 'matrix,' 'developer style,' or 'green on black.'

thumbnails.alt: Terminal style applied to a SharePoint list

references.name: List Styling Engine
references.description: The companion skill that applies these style tokens to a SharePoint list.

references.name: Demo video
references.description: Walkthrough of the list-styling engine and supporting style token skills.
